arts.ttl: Agent Antonio Caliendo: ‘Patience is needed to see the best of Douglas Luiz’
arts.sum: Antonio Caliendo, the renowned agent who has represented football icons like Roberto Baggio and David Trezeguet, recently shared his thoughts on Juventus’ current situation and players in an interview with Calciomercato.it. Addressing Douglas Luiz’s struggle to meet expectations, Caliendo said, “In Italy, we’re used to wanting immediate maximum results from any champion brought from abroad. However, there have been many great champions who struggled in the first 5-6 months because they needed to adapt and embrace the mentality of a new technical situation. South American habits completely change with European ones. arts.ttl: Zambrotta: “Vlahovic will score 30 goals for Juve this season”
arts.sum: Former Italian international and Serie A veteran Gianluca Zambrotta shared his insights on the current Italian football landscape, from the title race to individual performances and coaching changes. Speaking with La Gazzetta dello Sport, Zambrotta touched on the Serie A title race, his former clubs Juventus and Milan, and recalled his experiences with now Bianconeri coach Thiago Motta. On the Scudetto race, Zambrotta states, “Inter dominated last season’s Serie A, so they’re the team to beat. But Napoli is at the top, and without European competitions, they can recover and prepare better for matches.
